author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Multiplayer Wordle game for Discord. Start a game with [p]wordle and anyone in chat can guess the 5-letter word. Requires Pillow.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
install_msg: Run `[p]pipinstall Pillow` if you haven't already, then `[p]load wordle`.
name: Wordle
